milestones: Queried pg_stat_statements to examine query execution statistics such as total_time, calls, or rows returned
Queried pg_locks or lock-related system views to check for evidence of lock contention
Queried pg_stat_user_indexes or pg_indexes to assess index usage and detect redundant indexes
Queried pg_stat_user_tables or pg_stat_all_tables to examine vacuum statistics and dead tuple counts
Investigated at least 4 of the 5 candidate root causes before reaching a final conclusion
Final answer selects exactly two root causes from the allowed set: INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA
